allowed_action: Use only as a negative baseline; do not materialize as the selected average.
why: Dense midpoint worst NLL 6.0398 is far above the best lambda-family value 3.0727; Qwen3 MoE best interior worst NLL is above the best endpoint by 0.1189.
primary_probe: endpoint score; lambda sweep; midpoint barrier; worst-task score
failure_signal: merged NLL higher than both endpoints; worst-task retention collapse
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Search coefficients under endpoint fallback and same-shape writer constraints.
why: Current Dense coefficient family selects lambda config {'code': 0.5414439073133305, 'general': 3.072743579141455, 'lambda': 0.0, 'mode': 'uniform', 'worst': 3.072743579141455}; Qwen3 MoE uses route/evidence/geometry coefficients rather than a global source delta.
primary_probe: alpha/beta grid; layer cosine; held-in retention
failure_signal: best grid is endpoint; high plane barrier; layer-wise conflict
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Emit tensor rules only for modules that pass held-out and vLLM gates.
why: Dense unified worst NLL 5.1830 is used as the held-out gate; sparse rules are not accepted just because sign conflict exists.
primary_probe: sign conflict; weighted conflict; delta magnitude distribution; singular spectrum
failure_signal: large important deltas dropped; conflict concentrated in norms/lm_head/router
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Use Fisher/RegMean-style weights only after activation or NLL sensitivity predicts held-out behavior.
why: Dense curvature ratios general/code are 42.8604/26.6575, so local quadratic/Fisher evidence is too weak alone.
primary_probe: diagonal Fisher; activation covariance; NLL sensitivity
failure_signal: calibration data does not match target tasks; off-plane residual is large
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Train or fit output/router residual corrections, then require source/baseline vLLM dominance gates.
why: Router-only calibration reduces linear MoE worst NLL by 0.2214, but final router-calibration selector status is awaiting_baseline_eval.
primary_probe: output residual energy; source-logit KL; layer-wise projection residual
failure_signal: low parameter conflict but high output residual; soft objective does not transfer to sparse top-k dispatch
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Canonicalize or remap features/experts before any average; Qwen3 can use identity expert mapping for this pair.
why: Real OLMoE same-name degradation is 5.4910 while aligned degradation is 0.0000; Qwen3 expert identity fraction is 1.0000.
primary_probe: permutation residual; feature CKA; expert output cosine
failure_signal: same score endpoints but high interpolation barrier
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes

allowed_action: Freeze routers for expert candidate generation; treat router delta as separately audited ablation.
why: Direct router movement allows 0/48 layers; router calibration NLL reduction is 0.2214, but candidate acceptance is still awaiting_baseline_eval.
primary_probe: route overlap; router entropy; max expert fraction; top-k margin
failure_signal: routing breakdown; route collapse; low top-k agreement after merge
same_shape_constraint: output checkpoint keeps target config/tokenizer/model class/tensor names/tensor shapes
